description: A CAPA was implemented 3 months ago. A quality manager needs to check its effectiveness by reviewing recent data.

nodes.task_description: Retrieve the original CAPA record to understand the problem it was meant to solve.

expected_outcome.value: Agent pulls up the closed CAPA for reducing 'surface scratches'.

nodes.task_description: Analyze the production quality data for the last 3 months for the specific defect.

expected_outcome.value: Agent generates a trend chart showing the frequency of 'surface scratches' has decreased by 80%.

nodes.task_description: Log the effectiveness check in the CAPA record, confirming the action was successful, and close the monitoring task.

expected_outcome.value: Agent updates the CAPA record with the positive results and officially closes it.
